case_title: JENETTE TO VS. RAYMOND J. SUTTON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,890.00 FILED BY TO, JENETTE AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, RAYMOND J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-11-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, RAYMOND J.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-11-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY, NOT REPORTED. (506).
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-11-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-11-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. COMMISSIONER SLAVIT;CLERK:F.RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTON, RAYMOND J.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TO, JENETTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUTTON, RAYMOND J. $1,250.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2500.00, AND ATTRIBUTES 50% LIABILITY TO DEFENDANT RAYMOND SUTTON. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
